query:
SELECT blockId, submissionType, COUNT(*) AS n, MIN(submittedAt) AS earliest, MAX(submittedAt) AS latest
FROM assignmentSubmissions
WHERE contentText = '4' AND adultNotes LIKE '%archived%'
GROUP BY blockId, submissionType
ORDER BY n DESC
LIMIT 10;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute SELECT blockId, submissionType, COUNT(*) AS n, MIN(submittedAt) AS earliest, MAX(submittedAt) AS latest
FROM assignmentSubmissions
WHERE contentText = '4' AND adultNotes LIKE '%archived%'
